Hardware Component File

BCM J77 CLot (Soft 10.02)

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BCM_J77_CLot_(Soft_10.02).json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 745
Receive ID 765
Functional Addr 26
Functional Name UCBIC/BFR

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "68",
    "supplier": "?21",
    "soft": "0010",
    "version": "0200"
  }
]
